_doc: CIM topology B = production Metis Card. HAS on-card LPDDR4x DRAM; LLM-CAPABLE (runs precompiled INT8 LLMs). Carries TRANSPORT differences only; the CIM COMPUTE engine (M1, m1_cim.json) is topology-agnostic and SHARED with topology A. On-card LPDDR4x decode eff_BW 24.2 GB/s is the MEASURED L4 anchor (the decode memory wall). NO per-call PCIe floor for on-card weight streaming. 16 GiB capacity (machines.md). SAME 800 MHz AIPU as Alpha -> Card axrunmodel dev_lat/dev_gflops are directly comparable to Alpha's 13 points (CIM kernel re-validatable, not frozen).
honesty: calibrated compute (Alpha 13 pts; Card-revalidatable) + measured on-card BW

notes.floor: on-card weight streaming pays no per-call PCIe floor (contrast topology A 911 us).
notes.anchor: dram_eff_BW 24.2 = on-card LPDDR4x decode wall (L4 anchor, mem_lpddr4x).
notes.revalidation: same 800 MHz quad-core AIPU as Alpha; axrunmodel dev_fps = isolated compute -> CIM kernel re-measurable on Card, cross-check vs Alpha 13 pts, no clock rescale.
notes.clock: 800 MHz both boards (machines.md); fix Card DVFS to 800 if it differs.

provenance.dram_eff_BW_GBs: production Metis Card on-card LPDDR4x decode 24.2 GB/s (voyager-sdk.md:278) [measured]
